title: Argentinian Croquette Bites
description: Crispy fried bites filled with a creamy argentinian filling, perfect for a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a bowl, mix together the croquettes and butter until well combined.
Add the creamy cheese and mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into small balls and flatten slightly.
Dip each ball into the beaten egg and then coat in breadcrumbs.
Fry the croquette bites in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Drain the bites on paper towels and serve hot.
